full_description: Improve your productivity with Focus Timer, a simple and customizable app that implements the Pomodoro Technique. This technique involves working in focused, 25-minute increments, called 'Pomodoros,' separated by 5-minute breaks. After four Pomodoros, you take a longer break of 15-30 minutes. With Focus Timer, you can adjust the length of your work sessions and breaks to fit your needs. Set your own timer intervals, and stay on track with alerts and notifications. Key features include: customizable work sessions and breaks, alerts and notifications to keep you on track, simple and intuitive interface, and statistics to track your progress. Download Focus Timer now and start boosting your focus and efficiency!
